drl:
rule "R0"
salience -4
when
    T1(f0 not in (5.5, 5.5) || f1 contains "z" || !(f2 != true))
    T0(f0 > "ab")
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -3
when
    T1(f1 in ("zz"), f1 != "alpha", f2 == true || f0 < 5.5)
then
end
rule "R2"
no-loop
when
    ( T1(f0 not in (5.5, 5.5) || f1 contains "z" || !(f2 != true)) and T0(f0 > "ab") )
    or
    ( T1(f0 not in (5.5, 5.5) || f1 contains "z" || !(f2 != true)) and T0(f0 <= "alpha") )
    or
    ( T1(f0 not in (5.5, 5.5) || f1 contains "z" || !(f2 != true)) and T0(f0 > "ab") )
then
end
name: p353c
